forgot.title: Forgot password?
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send a reset link.
forgot.sent: If an account exists for this email, a reset link is on its way.

reset.success: Password updated. You can now log in with the new password.

verify.title: Check your email

fields.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

account.languageHint: Saved to your profile and used for emails.

errors.GENERIC: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.UNAUTHORIZED: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
errors.FORBIDDEN: This account is blocked. Contact support.
errors.RATE_LIMITED: Too many attempts. Please wait a minute and try again.
errors.INVALID_TOKEN: This link is invalid or has expired.
